plugin.name: App Launcher
plugin.description: Manage software shortcuts and executable paths, allowing Neko to launch apps for you, with autostart support.
entry.list_apps.name: List Registered Apps
entry.list_apps.description: Get all registered software list, including name, path, aliases, autostart status, etc.
entry.add_app.name: Add App
entry.add_app.description: Register a new software to the launcher. name is display name, path is full path (supports .exe, .lnk shortcuts, etc.), aliases is optional alias list for easy recognition.
entry.add_app.param.name: Software name, e.g.: Steam, Chrome, Spotify
entry.add_app.param.path: Full path, e.g.: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\Steam.exe or shortcut path
entry.add_app.param.aliases: Alias list for easy recognition, e.g.: ["steam", "gaming platform"]
entry.add_app.param.autostart: Whether to enable autostart (optional, default false, .exe only)
entry.remove_app.name: Remove App
entry.launch_app.name: Launch App
entry.launch_app.description: Launch software by app_id or name/alias. Uses app_id for exact match first, then tries name/alias fuzzy match.
entry.launch_app.param.name: Software name or alias (used when app_id not provided)
entry.get_available_apps.name: Get Available Apps
entry.get_available_apps.description: Get list of registered software that exist on disk, for Neko to know which apps can be launched. Returns name, aliases and autostart status.
entry.update_app.name: Update App
entry.update_app.description: Update registered software info (name, path, aliases, description).
entry.update_app.param.name: New name (optional)
entry.update_app.param.aliases: New alias list (optional, will override existing)
entry.set_autostart.name: Set Autostart
entry.set_autostart.description: Enable or disable autostart for registered software. Works via Windows Registry. Neko can help you set apps to start automatically on boot.
entry.get_autostart_status.name: Get Autostart Status
entry.get_autostart_status.description: Get autostart status for specified software. Neko can query whether an app is set to start automatically.
entry.get_all_autostart_status.name: Get All Autostart Status
entry.get_all_autostart_status.descripti: Get autostart status list for all registered software. Neko can see which apps have autostart enabled.
entry.get_recent_apps.name: Get Recent Apps
entry.get_recent_apps.description: Get recently launched apps for quick access to frequently used software.
entry.get_categories.name: Get Categories
entry.get_categories.description: Get all available app categories for organizing and managing software.
entry.export_apps.name: Export App Config
entry.export_apps.description: Export configuration for all registered apps for backup or migration.
error.path_invalid: Invalid path or not absolute path: {path}
ui.title: 🚀 App Launcher
ui.subtitle: Add your commonly used software here, and Neko can launch them for you~
ui.form.name: App Name *
ui.form.aliases.hint: Aliases help Neko recognize the app easily
ui.form.description.placeholder: Briefly describe what this software does...
ui.form.autostart.hint.not_exists: File not found, cannot set autostart
ui.empty: No apps yet, click "Add App" above to start
ui.recent.title: 🌸 Recent
ui.aliases.label: Aliases
ui.warning.update_autostart_failed: ⚠️ Updated successfully, but autostart setup failed: {error}
tutorial.title: 📚 Tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: Follow the tutorial to learn how to use App Launcher~
tutorial.step1.title: Method 1: Add via Shortcut (Easiest)
tutorial.step1.1: Right-click the app icon on desktop, click "Copy as path"
tutorial.step1.2: Paste into the plugin, set the app name (you can customize it)
tutorial.step1.3: Simple registration: fill aliases and description with the same name
tutorial.step1.4: Click save, make sure the plugin is running
tutorial.step1.5: Tell Neko "open" or "launch" (matching your app name), and Neko will open it for you~
tutorial.step2.title: Method 2: Add via Executable
tutorial.step2.1: Right-click desktop icon, click "Open file location"
tutorial.step2.2: Find the .exe file and right-click to copy path
tutorial.step2.3: Paste into plugin, fill in name, aliases, description, then save
tutorial.tip.title: 💡 Tips
tutorial.tip.path: Supports quoted paths - paste directly, no need to remove quotes
tutorial.tip.alias: Set multiple aliases for better recognition
tutorial.tip.autostart: .exe files can be set to autostart
